summary: Mixed performance with a solid first set and highlights like Wang Dang Doodle, Big RR Blues and White Rabbit; recording quality not discussed.
review: Fans describe the first set as tasty and tightly executed, praising the natural pairing of Wang Dang Doodle into Big RR Blues and a strong China Cat > I Know You Rider run. The second set divides opinion – some call it sloppy or disastrous while others rave about wild jams and White Rabbit – and no reviewer comments on the audio source or fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is mixed but leans positive thanks to several standout moments; recording quality is unknown, pulling the overall rating toward the middle of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviews contain no specific comments about soundboard clarity, audience bleed, or other audio characteristics.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is described as solid and tasty, with smooth song pairings; the second set receives mixed feedback – some label it sloppy or a disaster, others find it wild and exhilarating.
